variants._comment:: ($self$) 申请成为炮友 口上文
($self$) 拒绝成为炮友 口上文
($self$) 被拒绝成为炮友 口上文
($self$) 炮友关系破裂 口上文

zh-cn.relationship_fwb_propose_1: $self$一边整理着衣领，一边漫不经心地看向$target$。"如果只是纯粹解决生理需求的话，我不介意对象是你。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_propose_2: $self$靠在门框上，视线在$target$身上肆意扫了一圈。"今晚有空吗？别误会，我只是想找个人一起出出汗。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_propose_3: $self$弹了弹烟灰，语气平淡得像在谈论天气。"要在这种无聊的日子里找点乐子吗？去你家还是我家？"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_propose_4: $self$在手机上敲了几下，头也不抬地说道："我对谈恋爱没兴趣，但如果是床伴的话，你可以考虑一下。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_propose_5: $self$看着手中的酒杯，声音低沉："不仅是你，我也需要发泄一下。以此为共同前提，如何？"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_propose_6: $self$瞥了$target$一眼，嘴角似笑非笑。"你的眼神太明显了。如果不想负责任的话，我不反对哦。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_propose_7: $self$的手指轻轻划过$target$的手背，眼神变得迷离。"呐，$target$，我们要不要……试着跨过那条线？"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_propose_8: $self$凑近$target$的耳边，温热的气息喷洒在脖颈上。"既然我们身体这么合拍，不如把关系固定下来？只做快乐的事就好。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_propose_9: $self$咬着下唇，脸上带着一丝潮红。"其实……我一直在想，如果是和你做那种事的话，一定很舒服吧？"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_propose_10: $self$直接坐在了$target$的腿上，双手环住对方的脖子。"做我的专属抱枕吧，$target$。不需要复杂的承诺，只要快乐。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_propose_11: $self$笑着解开了自己的一颗扣子，眼神大胆而热烈。"反正我们都单身，互相慰藉一下寂寞的夜晚，听起来不错吧？"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_propose_12: $self$用脚尖轻轻蹭了蹭$target$的小腿。"我有好酒，也有好故事。今晚想不想留下来，深入交流一下？"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_set_1: $self$没有任何多余的表情，只是干脆地点了点头。"很好，那就这么定了。去酒店？"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_set_2: $self$看了一眼手表，迅速进入了状态。"既然达成了共识，那就别浪费时间了。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_set_3: $self$嘴角勾起一抹满意的弧度。"明智的选择。事后互不纠缠，这可是规矩。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_set_4: $self$随手将包扔在沙发上，开始解开头发。"先说好，我不喜欢过夜。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_set_5: $self$淡然地关上了身后的门，顺手锁上了锁。"那么，开始吧。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_set_6: $self$发出一声愉快的低笑，整个人扑进了$target$怀里。"就知道你拒绝不了我！今晚不准求饶哦！"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_set_7: $self$兴奋地拉着$target$的手往卧室走去。"太好了！我早就买了几件新内衣想给你看了！"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_set_8: $self$眼睛亮晶晶的，主动献上了一个深吻。"嗯……那从现在开始，我们就是秘密的共犯了？"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_set_9: $self$满脸通红地捂住脸，指缝间却漏出笑意。"真的答应了？那我可就不客气了……我会把你榨干的！"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_set_10: $self$开心地转了个圈，随后从背后抱住了$target$。"以后寂寞的时候，随时都可以来找我哦。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refuse_1: $self$皱了皱眉，往后退了一步拉开距离。"抱歉，我还没饥渴到这种程度。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refuse_2: $self$冷笑了一声，上下打量着$target$。"你是不是误会了什么？我对你没有那种性趣。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refuse_3: $self$面无表情地继续着手头的工作，仿佛没听见一样。"如果是这种无聊的玩笑，适可而止吧。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refuse_4: $self$叹了口气，眼神中透着一股疲惫。"我现在不想处理这种复杂的关系，找别人吧。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refuse_5: $self$抱起双臂，毫不留情地送客。"门在那边。这种话我就当没听过。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refuse_6: $self$有些尴尬地移开了视线，挠了挠脸颊。"啊哈哈……那个，我们还是做朋友比较合适吧？"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refuse_7: $self$伸手弹了一下$target$的额头，语气像是教训弟弟。"想什么呢！再乱说我可要生气了哦！"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refuse_8: $self$愣了一下，随即苦笑着摆摆手。"别开玩笑了，这样会毁了我们现在的关系的。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refuse_9: $self$认真地看着$target$的眼睛，轻轻摇了摇头。"我很珍惜你这个朋友，所以不想把你变成……那样的人。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refuse_10: $self$做了一个夸张的鬼脸，试图缓解气氛。"喂喂，我可是把你当兄弟/闺蜜的！太重口了吧！"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refused_1: $self$耸了耸肩，表情没有丝毫变化。"行吧，当我没说。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refused_2: $self$无所谓地撇了撇嘴，转身拿起手机。"没兴趣就算了，反正备选多的是。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refused_3: $self$冷淡地“哦”了一声，重新把注意力放回了书本上。"那就忘了吧，没什么大不了的。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refused_4: $self$甚至没有看$target$一眼，只是挥了挥手。"不愿意？那你可以走了。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refused_5: $self$整理了一下衣服，语气恢复了公事公办。"看来我们的需求不匹配。刚才的话作废。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refused_6: $self$失落地垂下肩膀，小声嘟囔着。"什么嘛……明明我身材还挺不错的……"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refused_7: $self$假装生气地鼓起脸颊，捶了$target$一下。"笨蛋！这么好的机会你居然错过了！以后别后悔！"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refused_8: $self$有些难过地咬着嘴唇，强颜欢笑。"啊……被拒绝了。好丢人，你就当我在发神经吧。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refused_9: $self$把脸埋进手掌里，发出懊恼的呻吟。"啊啊啊忘掉忘掉！刚才那个不是我！"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_refused_10: $self$有些幽怨地看了$target$一眼，叹了口气。"真是不解风情……算了，谁让我喜欢和你聊天多过和你上床呢。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_break_1: $self$冷冷地盯着$target$，眼神像是在看一件垃圾。"够了，这种关系到此为止。以后别再联系我。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_break_2: $self$一边穿衣服一边头也不回地往外走。"真让人倒胃口。这是最后一次。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_break_3: $self$将$target$的号码拉黑，动作行云流水。"我对你已经腻了。别再出现在我面前。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_break_4: $self$面无表情地指着大门。"滚出去。现在。立刻。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_break_5: $self$深吸了一口气，压抑着厌恶的情绪。"我们之间连肉体关系都没必要维持了。烂透了。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_break_6: $self$眼眶红红的，声音带着一丝哽咽。"我以为我们可以只谈快乐的……为什么会变成这样？"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_break_7: $self$失望地看着$target$，缓缓松开了手。"不行了……这种感觉不对了。我们还是……算了吧。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_break_8: $self$有些崩溃地抓着头发，情绪显得很激动。"我受不了了！这种不清不楚的关系，我不想再继续了！"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_break_9: $self$背对着$target$，肩膀微微颤抖。"在你把事情搞得更糟之前，我们最好彻底断了。"
zh-cn.relationship_fwb_break_10: $self$苦涩地笑了一下，眼泪却掉了下来。"果然，这种关系一开始就是个错误。再见，$target$。"

en-us.relationship_fwb_propose_1: $self$ adjusts her collar, glancing nonchalantly at $target$. "If it's just about satisfying physiological needs, I don't mind if it's you."
en-us.relationship_fwb_propose_2: $self$ leans against the doorframe, sweeping her gaze over $target$. "Are you free tonight? Don't get me wrong, I just want to find someone to break a sweat with."
en-us.relationship_fwb_propose_3: $self$ flicks some ash, her tone as flat as if discussing the weather. "Want to find some fun on such a boring day? Your place or mine?"
en-us.relationship_fwb_propose_4: $self$ taps on her phone, speaking without looking up: "I'm not interested in dating, but if you're up for being bed partners, you can consider it."
en-us.relationship_fwb_propose_5: $self$ looks at the wine glass in her hand, voice low: "Not just you, I need to vent too. How about we start with that premise?"
en-us.relationship_fwb_propose_6: $self$ glances at $target$, a faint smile playing on her lips. "Your look is too obvious. If you don't want any responsibility, I won't object."
en-us.relationship_fwb_propose_7: $self$ gently traces a finger over the back of $target$'s hand, eyes growing hazy. "Hey, $target$, shall we... try crossing that line?"
en-us.relationship_fwb_propose_8: $self$ leans close to $target$'s ear, warm breath tickling their neck. "Since our bodies are so compatible, why not make this regular? Let's just do the fun stuff."
en-us.relationship_fwb_propose_9: $self$ bites her lower lip, a flush on her face. "Actually... I've been wondering, doing that sort of thing with you... it must feel really good, right?"
en-us.relationship_fwb_propose_10: $self$ sits directly on $target$'s lap, arms wrapping around their neck. "Be my exclusive body pillow, $target$. No complex promises, just pleasure."
en-us.relationship_fwb_propose_11: $self$ smiles and unbuttons one of her buttons, gaze bold and passionate. "We're both single anyway, comforting each other on lonely nights sounds good, right?"
en-us.relationship_fwb_propose_12: $self$ gently rubs her toes against $target$'s calf. "I have good wine and good stories. Want to stay the night and communicate... deeply?"
en-us.relationship_fwb_set_1: $self$ shows no excess expression, simply nodding decisively. "Good, it's settled then. To a hotel?"
en-us.relationship_fwb_set_2: $self$ checks her watch, quickly getting into the zone. "Since we've reached a consensus, let's not waste time."
en-us.relationship_fwb_set_3: $self$ curves her lips into a satisfied smile. "Wise choice. No strings attached afterwards, that's the rule."
en-us.relationship_fwb_set_4: $self$ tosses her bag onto the sofa and starts letting her hair down. "Just so we're clear, I don't like staying overnight."
en-us.relationship_fwb_set_5: $self$ calmly closes the door behind her, locking it smoothly. "Well then, let's begin."
en-us.relationship_fwb_set_6: $self$ lets out a happy chuckle, throwing herself into $target$'s arms. "I knew you couldn't refuse me! No begging for mercy tonight!"
en-us.relationship_fwb_set_7: $self$ excitedly pulls $target$ by the hand towards the bedroom. "Great! I bought some new lingerie I've been dying to show you!"
en-us.relationship_fwb_set_8: $self$ eyes shining, actively offers a deep kiss. "Mmm... so from now on, we are secret accomplices?"
en-us.relationship_fwb_set_9: $self$ covers her face, blushing furiously, but a smile leaks through her fingers. "You really agreed? Then I won't hold back... I'm going to drain you dry!"
en-us.relationship_fwb_set_10: $self$ spins around happily, then hugs $target$ from behind. "Whenever you're lonely from now on, you can come find me anytime."
en-us.relationship_fwb_refuse_1: $self$ frowns, taking a step back to create distance. "Sorry, I'm not that desperate yet."
en-us.relationship_fwb_refuse_2: $self$ sneers, looking $target$ up and down. "Are you misunderstanding something? I have no such sexual interest in you."
en-us.relationship_fwb_refuse_3: $self$ continues her work expressionlessly, as if she heard nothing. "If this is some boring joke, stop it."
en-us.relationship_fwb_refuse_4: $self$ sighs, eyes revealing a trace of exhaustion. "I don't want to deal with such a complex relationship right now. Find someone else."
en-us.relationship_fwb_refuse_5: $self$ crosses her arms, mercilessly showing the way out. "The door is over there. I'll pretend I never heard that."
en-us.relationship_fwb_refuse_6: $self$ awkwardly looks away, scratching her cheek. "Ahaha... um, I think we're better off as friends, right?"
en-us.relationship_fwb_refuse_7: $self$ reaches out and flicks $target$'s forehead, tone like scolding a younger brother. "What are you thinking! Say that again and I'll get angry!"
en-us.relationship_fwb_refuse_8: $self$ pauses, then waves her hand with a wry smile. "Stop joking, that would ruin our current relationship."
en-us.relationship_fwb_refuse_9: $self$ looks earnestly into $target$'s eyes, shaking her head gently. "I cherish you as a friend, so I don't want to turn you into... that kind of person."
en-us.relationship_fwb_refuse_10: $self$ makes an exaggerated funny face, trying to ease the atmosphere. "Hey hey, I treat you like a brother/bestie! That's too hardcore!"
en-us.relationship_fwb_refused_1: $self$ shrugs, expression unchanged. "Alright, pretend I didn't say anything."
en-us.relationship_fwb_refused_2: $self$ twitches her mouth indifferently, turning to pick up her phone. "If you're not interested, fine. There are plenty of other options anyway."
en-us.relationship_fwb_refused_3: $self$ gives a cold 'oh' and turns her attention back to her book. "Forget it then, no big deal."
en-us.relationship_fwb_refused_4: $self$ waves her hand without even looking at $target$. "Unwilling? Then you can leave."
en-us.relationship_fwb_refused_5: $self$ adjusts her clothes, tone returning to businesslike. "It seems our needs don't match. Consider what I said void."
en-us.relationship_fwb_refused_6: $self$ drops her shoulders in disappointment, muttering softly. "What the hell... and here I thought my figure wasn't bad..."
en-us.relationship_fwb_refused_7: $self$ puffs up her cheeks in mock anger and punches $target$. "Idiot! You missed such a good opportunity! Don't regret it later!"
en-us.relationship_fwb_refused_8: $self$ bites her lip sadly, forcing a smile. "Ah... rejected. So embarrassing, just assume I was losing my mind."
en-us.relationship_fwb_refused_9: $self$ buries her face in her palms, groaning in frustration. "Aaaah forget it forget it! That wasn't me just now!"
en-us.relationship_fwb_refused_10: $self$ looks at $target$ with a hint of resentment, sighing. "You really don't get romance... whatever, I guess I like talking to you more than sleeping with you."
en-us.relationship_fwb_break_1: $self$ stares coldly at $target$, eyes like she's looking at trash. "Enough, this relationship ends here. Don't contact me again."
en-us.relationship_fwb_break_2: $self$ walks out without looking back while putting on her clothes. "Disgusting. This is the last time."
en-us.relationship_fwb_break_3: $self$ blocks $target$'s number, movements smooth and practiced. "I'm tired of you. Don't appear in front of me again."
en-us.relationship_fwb_break_4: $self$ points expressionlessly at the door. "Get out. Now. Immediately."
en-us.relationship_fwb_break_5: $self$ takes a deep breath, suppressing her disgust. "There's no need for us to maintain even a physical relationship anymore. It's rotten."
en-us.relationship_fwb_break_6: $self$ eyes red, voice choking up a bit. "I thought we could just talk about pleasure... why did it turn out like this?"
en-us.relationship_fwb_break_7: $self$ looks at $target$ with disappointment, slowly letting go. "I can't... this doesn't feel right anymore. Let's just... forget it."
en-us.relationship_fwb_break_8: $self$ grabs her hair, verging on a breakdown, emotional. "I can't take it anymore! I don't want to continue this vague relationship!"
en-us.relationship_fwb_break_9: $self$ turns her back to $target$, shoulders trembling slightly. "Before you make things worse, we'd better cut ties completely."
en-us.relationship_fwb_break_10: $self$ gives a bitter laugh, tears falling. "Sure enough, this relationship was a mistake from the start. Goodbye, $target$."
